title: soql-optimizer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the soql-optimizer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

scope_path.description: Example from AGENT.md: `force-app/main/default/classes/` or a single `.cls` Required column: 'yes'.

expected_record_count.description: Example from AGENT.md: `2_000_000` — used to escalate findings for LDV Required column: 'no'.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: if set, call `describe_org` to grab record counts for sObjects referenced Required column: 'no'.
target_org_alias.example: if set, call `describe_org` to grab record counts for sObjects referenced
